name: Ace Submarine
descriptionTemplate: Submarine units under command (excluding nuclear submarines) ignores enemy defense, and their attack range is increased by 1; after eliminating an enemy, there is a X% chance to attack again, and the chance can be increased by an additional 25% if a critical attack is dealt.

progression.renderedDesc: Submarine units under command (excluding nuclear submarines) ignores enemy defense, and their attack range is increased by 1; after eliminating an enemy, there is a 15% chance to attack again, and the chance can be increased by an additional 25% if a critical attack is dealt.
